import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(prefix)
    mut running = true
    while running
      match io.read_line()
      when Some(line)
        if string.starts_with(line, prefix)
          println("YES")
        else
          println("NO")
        end
      when None
        running = false
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
